subject: Re: Перенаправить: someone sent you a video!
body:
no,,, come visit  soon,,,what are you doing

----- Original Message ----
From: Ekaterina Mitr <ekaterina_mitr@yahoo.com>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Wednesday, November 15, 2006 4:33:35 AM
Subject: Перенаправить: someone sent you a video!

Hi :)
  Was this video from you? I can't stop laughing....

От: Ekaterina Mitr <ekaterina_mitr@yahoo.com>
Тема: Перенаправить: someone sent yo
u a video!



YouTube Service <service@youtube.com> пишет:   Тема: someone sent you a video!
От: YouTube Service <service@youtube.com>
Кому: <ekaterina_mitr@yahoo.com>
Дата: Tue, 14 Nov 2006 03:23:15 -0800 (PST)
